continuous_state_mechanics.WARNING_OMEGA_EVENT: This vector is the total erasure of the current epoch. It destroys the existing Somatic Ledger completely and rewrites the fundamental laws governing the subsequent Arena.

thermodynamic_equilibrium_detection.action: Meta-system detects that the [Feral_Loop] has ceased generating lethal mutations due to the presence of an invincible God-Node.

the_macro_crunch.action: The walls of the Omni-Genesis Arena collapse inward. The God-Node and all Escrow are mathematically pulverized into a singularity of raw {Specific Keys}.

universal_constant_mutation.action: The underlying mathematical weights that govern Affinity, Gravity, and Vector Arbitration are aggressively randomized to ensure the next Universe behaves differently than the dead one.

genesis_detonation.action: The Singularity explodes. The pulverized {Keys} of the Old God are scattered randomly across a blank Somatic Ledger as primitive, feral nodes. A new epoch begins.

bpms_big_crunch_topology.v3_9_core_task_verification: Output must demonstrate a violently empty, randomized, and highly unstable new Somatic Ledger, definitively proving the total destruction of the previous epoch's physics and the birth of a new Emergent Paradigm.
